title: A Detour Through Lyon
description: Lyon feels like a vibrant city that somehow manages to remain peaceful. We are hooked on the cultural and historical charm.
coverAlt: Hilltop view of Lyon's hazy skyline with residential buildings in the foreground

images.alt: Panoramic view from La Croix-Rousse hilltop, Lyon's skyline fading into winter haze, figures gathered along a low wall
images.caption: Looking out over Lyon from La Croix-Rousse — the whole city wrapped in February haze

images.alt: Giant bicycle shop storefront in Lyon with a large blue cyclist mural on the shutters and the Giant City logo above
images.caption: Spotted a Giant store in Lyon! Proudly from Taiwan! (And the store is pretty cute too)
